name: Redeemer
description: Striking with massive twin blades, the Redeemer fires the killing blow with its built-in shotgun.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Striking with massive twin blades, the Redeemer fires the killing blow with its built-in shotgun.

components.name: Dual Skana
components.description: A shorter Skana in each hand. Can hit multiple targets.

components.name: Vasto
components.description: Steady and reliable, the Vasto revolver combines speed and power for a classic gunslinger feel.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Steady and reliable, the Vasto revolver combines speed and power for a classic gunslinger feel.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer’s final shot not firing in the same direction as the rest of the melee attack combo.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.changes:
Mesa Prime, Akjagara Prime, and Redeemer Prime have entered the Vault!
Replaced Steel Meridian’s Sacrifice of Redeemer Prime Blade with Zhuge Prime String.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed icons for the Akjagara Prime and Redeemer Prime showing blue energy instead of the intended orange.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Steel Meridian’s Sacrifice of Destreza Prime Handle with Redeemer Prime Blade.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ugly and busted blast FX for the Sarpa, Redeemer, and Redeemer Prime.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer weapon series appearing to deal 10x Damage than it actually was.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer Prime firing FX.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where Redeemer and Redeemer Prime charged attacks had no Critical Chance.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed getting knocked down while firing a Gunblade weapon (Sarpa, Redeemer, etc) resulting in the weapon no longer firing rounds and the firing audio being incorrect.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Updated sounds to the Redeemer and Sarpa.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Sarpa and Redeemer trace distance reduced to 300m to match the rest of the non-sniper weapons.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Bullet Dance Stance Lead Tango combo not playing properly with the Redeemer causing it to loop gunfire repeatedly.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer not properly alerting enemies when fired.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a case of players sliding/teleporting really far when performing a ground finisher on enemies (notably with the Redeemer).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the firing sounds of the Redeemer and Sarpa when fired by other players.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer unintentionally having a slower charge shot as per:

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed volatile runners not exploding upon being killed by a shotgun blast from The Redeemer

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an error with the Redeemer that will prevent melee attacks after unequipping then re-equipping the weapon in combat. A heads up that more Redeemer fixes are being hammered out and likely deployed this week.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Redeemer being 'fully automatic'.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the charge time of the Redeemer and Glaive charge attack animation.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.6 + 18.0.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer’s shotgun visual FX not using customized energy colors.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Renamed Secondary Weapon Conclave Mod from HIGH NOON to SHOWDOWN so it doesn't conflict with the Redeemer Stance.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Redeemer's first hit not doing damage to enemies unless you were inside them.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Glaive and Redeemer charge attacks not working if you had a Fury mod equipped as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/501714-redeemer-first-swing-register-mistake/?p=5626134#entry5626134
Fixed the Redeemer and Glaive weapons being unable to do a charge attack when the player had a fast enough attack speed.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Redeemer playing the wrong sound when fired.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.5
patchlogs.changes: Updated animations on the Redeemer finishing attacks.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Added in stealth takedown sounds for the Redeemer when used on enemies frozen via the Glaxion.
